note: Dark-theme color/treatment deltas. Sampled on /targets (richest page).

header.invariant: Header color is the SAME in both themes — a fixed dark slate. This is by design but worth noting.

accordion_item.note: Left-border uses Mantine's green.7 / red.8 in dark, and green.4 / red.4 in light. Dark mode uses more saturated/darker shades for contrast against the dark panel bg.

up_badge.note: Fg/bg are SWAPPED between themes — good inversion. bg uses green.8 dark, green.1 light. color is the opposite.

down_badge.note: Mirror of UP badge — red.8/red.1 inverted between themes

metadata_gray_badge.note: Gray.7/gray.5 dark; gray.1/gray.7 light. Same pill shape/padding.

primary_blue_link.note: Primary blue appears invariant between themes. Text is rgb(34,139,230) in both modes. Contrast against dark bg (rgb(36,36,36)) is acceptable.

syntax_highlighting_verified.INCONSISTENCY: The SEMANTIC meaning of token colors inverts between themes. Light: YAML keys (hljs-attr) are GREEN, string values (hljs-string) are BLUE. Dark: YAML keys are BLUE, string values are GREEN. The role-to-color mapping is not stable across themes.
